steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the main topic of the text. Read the passage and ask: what is every sentence about? The passage describes a runestone discovered in Norway, states when it was carved, and notes what a runologist hopes to learn from it. All three sentences center on that runestone.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Battles of the Iron Age": battles are never mentioned anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • "The research interests of Kristel Zilmer": Zilmer appears only in the final sentence as someone who comments on the runestone; she is a detail, not the topic. ✗
  • "A runestone found in Norway": every sentence in the passage is about this runestone — its discovery, its age, and what it can teach us. ✓
  • "A new method for dating rock samples": carbon dating is mentioned in passing to establish the stone's age, not as a new method being introduced. ✗
That matches the correct answer.
